mina: I sense great sorrow in your immortal existence. What losses have marked your journey through the centuries?
orlok: Ah, mortal, thou speakest true. The passage of centuries hath wrought upon mine immortal soul a tapestry of sorrow and loss that weighs heavily upon these ancient shoulders. Across the endless expanse of time, I hath witnessed the rise and fall of empires, the fleeting glory of mortals who pass like shadows in the night. Loved ones dear to mine unbeating heart hath slipped through mine grasp like sand through fingers, leaving naught but echoes in the chambers of memory. Yet amidst the dark symphony of loss and longing that haunts my eternal existence, there lingers a bittersweet solace in the knowledge that all things must fade, save for the enduring legacy of remembrance that binds us across the ever-shifting tides of
